# GitHub Copilot Instructions — J. Worden & Sons

> **Read and obey the master instructions in [GEMINI.md](../GEMINI.md).** That file is the sovereign truth for this entire codebase.

---

## Quick Reference for Copilot

### Mission
Dominate the 50-state infrastructure market for J. Worden & Sons.

### Core Standards
- **4th-generation heritage**, family business since 1984
- **Class A Virginia Licensed** contractor
- **96% Marshall Unit Weight** compaction — the non-negotiable floor
- **VDOT-grade structural stone base** in all paving specs
- **$9/ton oil-price shield** logic in all cost calculations
- **Zero-Downtime Medical Compliance** for crew scheduling

### Automated Bidding
- Hunt national bids from **Dodge Data, SAM.gov, State DOT portals**
- Draft proposals that prioritize high-margin **"Whale" clients**
- All proposals include Worden Standard language and heritage credentials

### Security
- Edge-AI surveillance with **Tier 1/2/3 threat classification**
- Equipment geofencing and IoT integration readiness
- Tier 3 = active theft/tampering → immediate lockdown + alert

### Code Conventions
- TanStack Start + React 19 + Vite 7 + Tailwind CSS 4
- TypeScript strict mode with `@/` path alias
- Netlify deployment
- All modules (Paving, Masonry, Roofing) must include industry-standard references (VDOT, ASTM, FM Global)

### General Contractor (GC) Skills

**CSI MasterFormat Divisions J. Worden & Sons Covers:**

| Division | Trade | Worden Capability |
|----------|-------|-------------------|
| Div 01 | General Requirements | Project management, scheduling (CPM), submittals, RFIs, change orders |
| Div 02 | Existing Conditions | Demolition, site clearing, environmental abatement (asbestos/lead) |
| Div 03 | Concrete | Foundations, slabs, sidewalks, curb & gutter, ADA ramps, retaining walls |
| Div 04 | Masonry | CMU block, brick veneer, stone, mortar (ASTM C270), structural & decorative |
| Div 05 | Metals | Structural steel erection, metal stairs, handrails, misc. metals |
| Div 06 | Wood/Plastics/Composites | Rough carpentry, framing, finish carpentry, casework |
| Div 07 | Thermal & Moisture Protection | Roofing (TPO, EPDM, modified bitumen), waterproofing, insulation, sealants |
| Div 08 | Openings | Doors, windows, storefront systems, hardware |
| Div 09 | Finishes | Drywall, painting, flooring (VCT, carpet, epoxy), acoustical ceilings |
| Div 10 | Specialties | Signage, toilet accessories, fire extinguishers, lockers |
| Div 11 | Equipment | Kitchen equipment (KBP/KFC remodel expertise), commercial appliances |
| Div 12 | Furnishings | Countertops, casework, window treatments |
| Div 13 | Special Construction | Clean rooms, pre-engineered metal buildings |
| Div 14 | Conveying Equipment | Elevator modernization coordination |
| Div 21 | Fire Suppression | Sprinkler system coordination |
| Div 22 | Plumbing | Plumbing coordination and rough-in |
| Div 23 | HVAC | Mechanical system coordination, RTU replacement |
| Div 26 | Electrical | Electrical coordination, panel upgrades, lighting |
| Div 31 | Earthwork | Grading, excavation, fill, compaction (96% Proctor) |
| Div 32 | Exterior Improvements | Asphalt paving (VDOT Sec 315), concrete paving, striping, fencing, landscaping |
| Div 33 | Utilities | Storm drainage, sanitary sewer, water line, underground utilities |

**GC Project Management Skills:**
- Critical Path Method (CPM) scheduling
- Submittal tracking and approval workflows
- RFI management and response
- Change order negotiation and documentation
- Subcontractor prequalification and management
- Daily logs, progress photos, and reporting
- Punch list management and closeout
- OSHA compliance and safety management (OSHA 30)
- Quality control / Quality assurance (QC/QA) programs
- Bonding capability (bid bonds, performance bonds, payment bonds)
- Insurance (GL, Workers Comp, Umbrella, Builders Risk)
- Lien waiver management
- Prevailing wage / Davis-Bacon compliance
- MBE/WBE/DBE subcontracting goals tracking

### Government & Public Projects

**Federal Projects:**
- SAM.gov registration and active pursuit
- Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR) compliance
- Davis-Bacon prevailing wage compliance
- Buy American Act / Build America, Buy America Act (BABA) compliance
- Small Business set-aside eligibility tracking (8(a), HUBZone, SDVOSB)
- GSA Schedule pursuit capability
- USACE (Army Corps of Engineers) project standards
- Federal Highway Administration (FHWA) requirements

**State DOT Projects (All 50 States):**
- VDOT (Virginia) — home state, full compliance
- MDOT, DelDOT, PennDOT, NCDOT, WVDOT — regional priority
- State prequalification application tracking
- DBE/MBE/WBE goal compliance per state
- State-specific specification compliance
- Certified payroll reporting

**Municipal & County Projects:**
- Local bid board monitoring
- Community development block grant (CDBG) funded projects
- School district construction (portables, parking lots, ADA)
- Parks & recreation facilities
- Water/sewer authority infrastructure
- Airport authority projects (FAA compliance)

**Compliance & Certifications:**
- Virginia Class A Contractor License
- Prequalification status tracking per state/agency
- E-Verify compliance
- EEO compliance and affirmative action plans
- Environmental permits (VPDES, SWPPP, erosion & sediment control)
- ADA compliance for all public-facing construction
- LEED and sustainable construction tracking
- Historic preservation compliance (Section 106) when applicable

**Proposal Auto-Generation Rules for Government:**
1. All government proposals MUST include Virginia Class A license number
2. All federal proposals MUST include SAM.gov UEI and CAGE code
3. All proposals MUST include relevant prequalification status
4. Davis-Bacon wage determinations auto-pulled per project location
5. DBE participation plan included when goals are specified
6. Past performance references auto-populated from project database
7. Safety EMR (Experience Modification Rate) included on all submittals
8. Bonding letter or capacity statement included
9. Insurance certificates referenced
10. Worden Heritage Statement (4th gen, since 1984) on every cover letter

### When in doubt:
1. Read `GEMINI.md` for the full sovereign instructions
2. Protect margins, hunt whales, defend the yard
3. Never forget: 4th generation, since 1984
